hil_handoff.reason: GDPR scope not confirmed as in-scope (applies='no')

reasons: The policy text explicitly states it was archived in 2011 and extracted from a privacy policy predating GDPR.

The policy states it does not apply to information collected through means other than the website, and does not provide sufficient detail on the processing of personal data to determine applicability under GDPR Art. 2.
evidence: The following text is extracted and transformed from the aap.org privacy policy that was archived on 2011-11-26.
This Privacy Policy does not apply to the use or disclosure of information that is collected or obtained through means other than this Web site.

hil_queue.reason: GDPR scope not confirmed as in-scope (applies='no')
